CheckTitle: Security group restricts all-port access from the internet
Description: Checks that no ECS security group Accept rule exposes all protocols and ports to unrestricted IPv4 (`0.0.0.0/0`) or IPv6 (`::/0`) sources.
Risk: Unrestricted access to all ports enables broad scanning, remote exploitation, unauthorized access, and data exfiltration, threatening confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

Code.Other: The CLI example is IPv4-specific. Also remove the corresponding IPv6 `::/0` rule, or restrict both `SourceCidrIp` and `Ipv6SourceCidrIp` rules and ports to those required by the workload.

Recommendation.Text: Apply least privilege and do not allow all ports from `0.0.0.0/0` or `::/0`.
